assumptions: The intragroup dividend receivable is a recognised intragroup monetary item denominated in a currency that creates exchange differences not fully eliminated on consolidation because the relevant group entities have different functional currencies.

approaches.label: Hedge the foreign currency risk of the intragroup monetary item
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 expressly allows foreign currency risk on an intragroup monetary item to be designated as a hedged item in consolidated financial statements when that risk survives consolidation.
